values.name: AUTHORIZATION
values.description: Authorization.

values.name: BRANCH_NAME_PATTERN
values.description: Branch name pattern.

values.name: CODE_SCANNING
values.description: Choose which tools must provide code scanning results before the reference is updated. When configured, code scanning must be enabled and have results for both the commit and the reference being updated.

values.name: COMMITTER_EMAIL_PATTERN
values.description: Committer email pattern.

values.name: COMMIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL_PATTERN
values.description: Commit author email pattern.

values.name: COMMIT_MESSAGE_PATTERN
values.description: Commit message pattern.

values.name: COPILOT_CODE_REVIEW
values.description: Request Copilot code review for new pull requests automatically if the author has access to Copilot code review and their premium requests quota has not reached the limit.

values.name: CREATION
values.description: Only allow users with bypass permission to create matching refs.

values.name: DELETION
values.description: Only allow users with bypass permissions to delete matching refs.

values.name: FILE_EXTENSION_RESTRICTION
values.description: Prevent commits that include files with specified file extensions from being pushed to the commit graph.

values.name: FILE_PATH_RESTRICTION
values.description: Prevent commits that include changes in specified file and folder paths from being pushed to the commit graph. This includes absolute paths that contain file names.

values.name: LOCK_BRANCH
values.description: Branch is read-only. Users cannot push to the branch.

values.name: MAX_FILE_PATH_LENGTH
values.description: Prevent commits that include file paths that exceed the specified character limit from being pushed to the commit graph.

values.name: MAX_FILE_SIZE
values.description: Prevent commits with individual files that exceed the specified limit from being pushed to the commit graph.

values.name: MAX_REF_UPDATES
values.description: Max ref updates.

values.name: MERGE_QUEUE
values.description: Merges must be performed via a merge queue.

values.name: MERGE_QUEUE_LOCKED_REF
values.description: Merge queue locked ref.

values.name: NON_FAST_FORWARD
values.description: Prevent users with push access from force pushing to refs.

values.name: PULL_REQUEST
values.description: Require all commits be made to a non-target branch and submitted via a pull request before they can be merged.

values.name: REQUIRED_DEPLOYMENTS
values.description: Choose which environments must be successfully deployed to before refs can be pushed into a ref that matches this rule.

values.name: REQUIRED_LINEAR_HISTORY
values.description: Prevent merge commits from being pushed to matching refs.

values.name: REQUIRED_REVIEW_THREAD_RESOLUTION
values.description: When enabled, all conversations on code must be resolved before a pull request can be merged into a branch that matches this rule.

values.name: REQUIRED_SIGNATURES
values.description: Commits pushed to matching refs must have verified signatures.

values.name: REQUIRED_STATUS_CHECKS
values.description: Choose which status checks must pass before the ref is updated. When enabled, commits must first be pushed to another ref where the checks pass.

values.name: REQUIRED_WORKFLOW_STATUS_CHECKS
values.description: Require all commits be made to a non-target branch and submitted via a pull request and required workflow checks to pass before they can be merged.

values.name: SECRET_SCANNING
values.description: Secret scanning.

values.name: TAG
values.description: Tag.

values.name: TAG_NAME_PATTERN
values.description: Tag name pattern.

values.name: UPDATE
values.description: Only allow users with bypass permission to update matching refs.

values.name: WORKFLOWS
values.description: Require all changes made to a targeted branch to pass the specified workflows before they can be merged.

values.name: WORKFLOW_UPDATES
values.description: Workflow files cannot be modified.

unions.name: RuleParameters
unions.description: Types which can be parameters for RepositoryRule objects.

inputFields.name: clientMutationId
inputFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

inputFields.name: enterpriseId
inputFields.description: The ID of the enterprise account to which the administrator should be added.

inputFields.name: login
inputFields.description: The login of the user to add as an administrator.

inputObjects.name: RuleParametersInput
inputObjects.description: Specifies the parameters for a RepositoryRule object. Only one of the fields should be specified.

scalars.name: BigInt
scalars.description: Represents non-fractional signed whole numeric values. Since the value may exceed the size of a 32-bit integer, it's encoded as a string.

scalars.name: CustomPropertyValue
scalars.description: A custom property value can be either a string or an array of strings. All property types support only a single string value, except for the multi-select type, which supports only a string array.

scalars.name: Float
scalars.description: Represents signed double-precision fractional values as specified by IEEE 754.

scalars.name: GitTimestamp
scalars.description: An ISO-8601 encoded date string. Unlike the DateTime type, GitTimestamp is not converted in UTC.

scalars.name: ID
scalars.description: Represents a unique identifier that is Base64 obfuscated. It is often used to refetch an object or as key for a cache. The ID type appears in a JSON response as a String; however, it is not intended to be human-readable. When expected as an input type, any string (such as "VXNlci0xMA==") or integer (such as 4) input value will be accepted as an ID.

scalars.name: Int
scalars.description: Represents non-fractional signed whole numeric values. Int can represent values between -(2^31) and 2^31 - 1.

scalars.name: PreciseDateTime
scalars.description: An ISO-8601 encoded UTC date string with millisecond precision.

scalars.name: String
scalars.description: Represents textual data as UTF-8 character sequences. This type is most often used by GraphQL to represent free-form human-readable text.

scalars.name: URI
scalars.description: An RFC 3986, RFC 3987, and RFC 6570 (level 4) compliant URI string.
